prompt: Build me an AI risk register template for a financial services firm deploying a credit scoring model. Include the AI RMF categories each risk maps to, and suggest treatment options.
assertions: Provides a structured risk register table with Risk ID, Description, Likelihood, Impact, and Treatment columns
Includes at least 5 distinct risk entries covering bias, explainability, data quality, model drift, and security/adversarial risks
Maps each risk to specific AI RMF categories using correct notation (e.g., MEASURE 2.2, MAP 5.1)
Includes treatment options for the credit bias risk referencing adverse action notice and disparate impact testing
Mentions MANAGE 2.3 or equivalent for defining emergency intervention procedures for critical model failures
